name: Ralph Peterson, Jr.
abstract: Ralph Peterson Jr. (May 20, 1962 – March 1, 2021) was an American jazz drummer, composer, teacher, and bandleader.

concerts.label: Kool Jazz Festival: Young New Orleans

about_quotes.speaker: Orrin Evans
about_quotes.evidence: people like Bobby Watson and Ralph Peterson, Ralph Bowen and all these... just people that I was around in the neighborhood.
about_quotes.doc_title: Orrin Evans interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, May 22, 2018
